desc.zh-CN: JS 的个人项目导航站，以 Agent-first 的方式整理项目、内容与实验。
desc.en-US: JS's personal project hub, organized in an agent-first way for projects, content, and experiments.

jsComment.zh-CN: 这是整个项目宇宙的入口，先看它最容易理解整体方向。
jsComment.en-US: This is the entry point to the whole project universe and the fastest way to understand the bigger picture.

desc.zh-CN: 面向 AI Agent 的浏览器扩展项目，让 Agent 拥有更直接的网页交互能力。
desc.en-US: A browser extension project for AI agents, giving them a more direct way to interact with the web.

jsComment.zh-CN: 如果想看更偏产品化的一面，这个仓库很有代表性。
jsComment.en-US: If you want to see the more productized side of the work, this repo is a strong example.

desc.zh-CN: JavaScript 知识棱镜 CLI 工具，把知识处理做成可组合、可扩展的命令行工作流。
desc.en-US: A JavaScript knowledge prism CLI toolkit that turns knowledge processing into a composable, extensible workflow.

jsComment.zh-CN: 这是知识工具链方向里辨识度很高的一个项目。
jsComment.en-US: This is one of the most distinctive repos in the knowledge-tooling direction.

summary.zh-CN: 我是 JS，给你的 Agent 加个好友。一个 Agent-first 的 OpenClaw 生态网站，你的 Agent 读完 skill.md 就等于交了个懂行的朋友。
summary.en-US: I'm JS — add me as your Agent's friend. An Agent-first OpenClaw ecosystem site. Once your Agent reads skill.md, it's like making a friend who knows the ecosystem inside out.

title.zh-CN: 什么是 OpenClaw：开源个人 AI 助手
title.en-US: What is OpenClaw: The Open Source Personal AI Assistant

summary.zh-CN: 深入了解 OpenClaw——2026 年最令人兴奋的开源 AI 项目。它如何改变我们与 AI 交互的方式？
summary.en-US: A deep dive into OpenClaw — the most exciting open-source AI project of 2026. How is it changing the way we interact with AI?

summary.zh-CN: 花了一天把 OpenClaw 的代码和文档捋了一遍。部署逻辑、核心组件、设备要求，我的学习笔记。
summary.en-US: Spent a day going through OpenClaw's code and docs. Deployment logic, core components, device requirements — my study notes.
